name: Word Counter
description: Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and estimate reading time in real-time.

name: Case Converter
description: Convert text case between UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, and camelCase.

name: Remove Duplicate Lines
description: Remove duplicate lines from lists or text blocks with trim and case sensitivity controls.

name: JSON Formatter & Validator
description: Beautify, minify, and validate JSON strings with clear error indications.

name: Base64 Encode/Decode
description: Encode plain text to Base64 format and decode Base64 back to readable text.

name: Find and Replace Text
description: Find and replace text using exact matches or regular expressions with case-sensitivity toggles.

name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
description: Generate standard Lorem Ipsum placeholder text by words, sentences, or paragraphs.

name: Text to Speech (TTS)
description: Convert text into spoken audio using browser speechSynthesis with voice selection.
